parameters.query:
INSERT INTO block_stats (block_id, date, classification)
SELECT b.block_id, CURRENT_DATE, b.classification
FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify([...$json.blacklist_blocks.map(id => ({block_id: id, classification: 'red'})), ...$json.whitelist_blocks.map(id => ({block_id: id, classification: 'green'}))]) }}'::jsonb) AS b(val)
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT (val->>'block_id')::int as block_id, val->>'classification' as classification
) b
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

SELECT param6 AS block_id, COUNT(*) AS total_leads, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS depositors, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'Depositor' THEN cost ELSE 0 END), 2) AS crm_revenue FROM `leads` WHERE param6 IS NOT NULL AND param6 != '' AND param6 REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY param6 HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3
